name: Entrata
description: Entrata is a property management platform for multifamily housing that provides an all-in-one operating system for autonomous property management. Its REST API enables integration partners to access and manage properties, residents, leases, maintenance, payments, and reporting data in near real-time.

hasOfferCatalog.name: Entrata API
hasOfferCatalog.description: The Entrata API provides programmatic access to the Entrata property management platform, enabling integration partners to read and write property, resident, lease, maintenance, payment, and financial data.
